reasoning: Lactate clearance is your primary limiter, evidenced by the 25W drop from your 5-min to 20-min power. Your last ride shows underperformance in adapting to sustained efforts. This workout simulates the demands of the Alpine Loop's key climb, targeting improvements in aerobic endurance and fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets: 6 min at 201-218W, 3 min at 242-256W. Focus on smooth transitions and maintaining rhythm.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
